data.content: 1. Rejected in implementation_review because the change introduces a regression in terminal cascades. 2. make sanity fails in app::tests_hierarchy::deferred_descendant_is_cascaded_in_terminal_transition (src/app/tests_hierarchy.rs:460-492): abandoning a parent with an approved cascade should also abandon a deferred child. 3. The failure comes from src/app.rs:1337-1373 calling write_state_change_locked for descendants with force=false, which then trips the deferred resume guard in src/app.rs:1283-1293 and returns InvalidArgument("deferred knots may only resume to 'implementation'"). 4. The new parent auto-resolution hooks in src/app.rs:806-807, 855-856, and 1266-1267 are not safe to ship until the deferred-descendant cascade path is fixed and sanity is green again.
